creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: gavin
Date: Sun Mar 14 15:49:04 2010
New Revision: 205155
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/base/205155

Log:
  Add extra Xrefs
  
  PR:		docs/114184
  Submitted by:	Julian Stacey  <jhs berklix.org>
  MFC after:	1 week

Modified:
  head/share/man/man4/ndis.4

Modified: head/share/man/man4/ndis.4
==============================================================================
--- head/share/man/man4/ndis.4	Sun Mar 14 14:24:35 2010	(r205154)
+++ head/share/man/man4/ndis.4	Sun Mar 14 15:49:04 2010	(r205155)
@@ -30,7 +30,7 @@
 .\"
 .\" $FreeBSD$
 .\"
-.Dd February 8, 2010
+.Dd March 14, 2010
 .Dt NDIS 4
 .Os
 .Sh NAME
@@ -133,8 +133,10 @@ before a timeout expired.
 .Xr netintro 4 ,
 .Xr ng_ether 4 ,
 .Xr ifconfig 8 ,
+.Xr ndis_events 8 ,
 .Xr ndiscvt 8 ,
-.Xr ndisgen 8
+.Xr ndisgen 8 ,
+.Xr wpa_supplicant 8
 .Rs
 .%T "NDIS 5.1 specification"
 .%U http://www.microsoft.com
